list.name: Config Changes
list.rawSql: SELECT collected_at AS time, summary AS text, COALESCE(asset, symbol, source_table) AS tags FROM config_change_events WHERE ('${asset:raw}' = '__all' OR asset = '${asset:raw}' OR asset IS NULL) AND ('${symbol:raw}' = '__all' OR symbol = '${symbol:raw}' OR symbol IS NULL) ORDER BY collected_at

target.rawSql: SELECT collected_at AS time, summary AS text, COALESCE(asset, symbol, source_table) AS tags FROM config_change_events WHERE ('${asset:raw}' = '__all' OR asset = '${asset:raw}' OR asset IS NULL) AND ('${symbol:raw}' = '__all' OR symbol = '${symbol:raw}' OR symbol IS NULL) ORDER BY collected_at

links.title: High Contrast
links.tooltip: Switch to light theme for high contrast lines

targets.rawSql: SELECT close_time AS time, close::double precision AS value FROM spot_klines WHERE symbol = '${symbol:raw}' ORDER BY close_time
SELECT collected_at AS time, available_inventory::double precision AS value FROM margin_available_inventory_snapshots WHERE asset = '${asset:raw}' ORDER BY collected_at
SELECT collected_at AS time, metric_value AS value FROM derived_metrics WHERE symbol = '${symbol:raw}' AND metric_name = 'stress_proxy_zinv' ORDER BY collected_at

WITH latest AS ( SELECT available_inventory::double precision AS current_value FROM margin_available_inventory_snapshots WHERE asset = '${asset:raw}' ORDER BY collected_at DESC LIMIT 1 ), past AS ( SELECT available_inventory::double precision AS past_value FROM margin_available_inventory_snapshots WHERE asset = '${asset:raw}' AND collected_at <= COALESCE( (SELECT MAX(collected_at) FROM margin_available_inventory_snapshots WHERE asset = '${asset:raw}' AND collected_at <= NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours') /* , (SELECT MIN(collected_at) FROM margin_available_inventory_snapshots WHERE asset = '${asset:raw}') */ ) ORDER BY collected_at DESC LIMIT 1 ) SELECT NOW() AS time, (latest.current_value - past.past_value) / NULLIF(past.past_value, 0) AS value FROM latest CROSS JOIN past

WITH latest AS ( SELECT available_inventory::double precision AS current_value FROM margin_available_inventory_snapshots WHERE asset = '${asset:raw}' ORDER BY collected_at DESC LIMIT 1 ), past AS ( SELECT available_inventory::double precision AS past_value FROM margin_available_inventory_snapshots WHERE asset = '${asset:raw}' AND collected_at <= COALESCE( (SELECT MAX(collected_at) FROM margin_available_inventory_snapshots WHERE asset = '${asset:raw}' AND collected_at <= NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days') /* , (SELECT MIN(collected_at) FROM margin_available_inventory_snapshots WHERE asset = '${asset:raw}') */ ) ORDER BY collected_at DESC LIMIT 1 ) SELECT NOW() AS time, (latest.current_value - past.past_value) / NULLIF(past.past_value, 0) AS value FROM latest CROSS JOIN past
SELECT collected_at AS time, metadata->>'label' AS value FROM derived_metrics WHERE symbol = '${symbol:raw}' AND metric_name = 'stress_regime' ORDER BY collected_at DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT close_time AS time, close::double precision AS price FROM spot_klines WHERE symbol = '${symbol:raw}' AND $__timeFilter(close_time) ORDER BY close_time

SELECT collected_at AS time, available_inventory::double precision AS inventory FROM margin_available_inventory_snapshots WHERE asset = '${asset:raw}' AND $__timeFilter(collected_at) ORDER BY collected_at

SELECT collected_at AS time, CASE WHEN metric_value >= 0 THEN metric_value END AS positive, CASE WHEN metric_value < 0 THEN metric_value END AS negative FROM derived_metrics WHERE symbol = '${symbol:raw}' AND metric_name = 'stress_proxy_zinv' AND $__timeFilter(collected_at) ORDER BY collected_at

SELECT collected_at AS time, metric_value AS corr_24h FROM derived_metrics WHERE symbol = '${symbol:raw}' AND metric_name = 'rolling_corr_price_vs_inventory_24h' AND $__timeFilter(collected_at) ORDER BY collected_at

SELECT collected_at AS time, metric_value AS corr_7d FROM derived_metrics WHERE symbol = '${symbol:raw}' AND metric_name = 'rolling_corr_price_vs_inventory_7d' AND $__timeFilter(collected_at) ORDER BY collected_at

panels.title: Rolling Correlation: Price Returns vs Inventory Changes

targets.rawSql: SELECT collected_at AS time, 100 + ((metric_value - 100) * 10) AS normalized_price_100_x10 FROM derived_metrics WHERE symbol = '${symbol:raw}' AND metric_name = 'normalized_price_100' AND $__timeFilter(collected_at) ORDER BY collected_at

SELECT collected_at AS time, metric_value AS normalized_inventory_100 FROM derived_metrics WHERE symbol = '${symbol:raw}' AND metric_name = 'normalized_inventory_100' AND $__timeFilter(collected_at) ORDER BY collected_at
SELECT close_time AS time, close::double precision AS price FROM spot_klines WHERE symbol = '${symbol:raw}' AND $__timeFilter(close_time) ORDER BY close_time

SELECT collected_at AS time, available_inventory::double precision AS inventory FROM margin_available_inventory_snapshots WHERE asset = '${asset:raw}' AND $__timeFilter(collected_at) ORDER BY collected_at

WITH inv AS ( SELECT collected_at, available_inventory::double precision AS inv, LAG(available_inventory::double precision) OVER (ORDER BY collected_at) AS prev_inv FROM margin_available_inventory_snapshots WHERE asset = '${asset:raw}' ) SELECT collected_at AS time, -GREATEST(0, prev_inv - inv) AS borrow_proxy FROM inv WHERE $__timeFilter(collected_at) AND prev_inv IS NOT NULL ORDER BY collected_at

WITH inv AS ( SELECT collected_at, available_inventory::double precision AS inv, LAG(available_inventory::double precision) OVER (ORDER BY collected_at) AS prev_inv FROM margin_available_inventory_snapshots WHERE asset = '${asset:raw}' ) SELECT collected_at AS time, GREATEST(0, inv - prev_inv) AS repay_proxy FROM inv WHERE $__timeFilter(collected_at) AND prev_inv IS NOT NULL ORDER BY collected_at

WITH ratios AS ( SELECT close_time, CASE WHEN (volume - taker_buy_base_volume) > 0 THEN (taker_buy_base_volume / (volume - taker_buy_base_volume))::double precision ELSE NULL END AS ratio, LAG( CASE WHEN (volume - taker_buy_base_volume) > 0 THEN (taker_buy_base_volume / (volume - taker_buy_base_volume))::double precision ELSE NULL END ) OVER (ORDER BY close_time) AS prev_ratio FROM spot_klines WHERE symbol = '${symbol:raw}' ) SELECT close_time AS time, CASE WHEN prev_ratio > 0 THEN ((ratio - prev_ratio) / prev_ratio * 100) ELSE NULL END AS buy_sell_pct_change FROM ratios WHERE $__timeFilter(close_time) ORDER BY close_time

panels.title: Combined: Price, Inventory, Borrow/Repay Proxy, Buy/Sell Change

targets.rawSql: SELECT collected_at AS time, symbol, price::double precision AS price FROM margin_price_index_snapshots WHERE symbol = '${symbol:raw}' ORDER BY collected_at DESC LIMIT 50

SELECT collected_at, symbol, tier, effective_multiple, initial_risk_ratio, liquidation_risk_ratio, base_asset_max_borrowable, quote_asset_max_borrowable FROM isolated_margin_tier_snapshots WHERE symbol = '${symbol:raw}' ORDER BY collected_at DESC LIMIT 20
SELECT collected_at, asset, collateral_ratio, discount_rate FROM cross_margin_collateral_ratio_snapshots WHERE ('${asset:raw}' = '__all' OR asset = '${asset:raw}') ORDER BY collected_at DESC LIMIT 50
SELECT collected_at, asset, liquidation_ratio, warning_ratio FROM risk_based_liquidation_ratio_snapshots WHERE ('${asset:raw}' = '__all' OR asset = '${asset:raw}') ORDER BY collected_at DESC LIMIT 50

SELECT collected_at, source_table, event_type, summary FROM config_change_events WHERE ('${asset:raw}' = '__all' OR asset = '${asset:raw}' OR asset IS NULL) AND ('${symbol:raw}' = '__all' OR symbol = '${symbol:raw}' OR symbol IS NULL) ORDER BY collected_at DESC LIMIT 100

list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT base_asset AS __text, base_asset AS __value FROM margin_pairs WHERE is_margin_trade = TRUE AND quote_asset IN ('USDC','USDT','FDUSD') UNION SELECT DISTINCT asset, asset FROM margin_available_inventory_snapshots WHERE asset IS NOT NULL ORDER BY 1
list.label: asset
list.name: asset
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT base_asset AS __text, base_asset AS __value FROM margin_pairs WHERE is_margin_trade = TRUE AND quote_asset IN ('USDC','USDT','FDUSD') UNION SELECT DISTINCT asset, asset FROM margin_available_inventory_snapshots WHERE asset IS NOT NULL ORDER BY 1

list.definition: SELECT symbol AS __text, symbol AS __value FROM margin_pairs WHERE base_asset = '$asset' AND is_margin_trade = TRUE AND quote_asset IN ('USDC','USDT','FDUSD') ORDER BY quote_asset ASC LIMIT 1
list.label: symbol
list.name: symbol
list.query: SELECT symbol AS __text, symbol AS __value FROM margin_pairs WHERE base_asset = '$asset' AND is_margin_trade = TRUE AND quote_asset IN ('USDC','USDT','FDUSD') ORDER BY quote_asset ASC LIMIT 1
